name: You stay at your friend's place after a night out and her sister is quite horny
description: After a night out, your friend Bella lets you stay at her flat, which she shares with her sister Trixie. The three of you have had a good time but it's gotten really late, so now you'd expect to finally get some rest... but Trixie seems to not be that tired yet.
creator: SlaaneshCultist
